data.title: Gate US will host a high-end closed-door reception during Consensus Miami, focusing on institutional-grade crypto infrastructure.
data.description: Gate US, in partnership with leading blockchain security firm Halborn, will host a VIP Institutional Soirée during Consensus Miami on May 5th. The event aims to build a high-quality platform for institutional collaboration and networking. Located at the prestigious Villa Casa Casuarina (the Versace mansion), the event will feature in-depth discussions on topics such as crypto industry trends, security infrastructure development, and compliance prospects. This invitation-only event is expected to attract over 200 key participants from institutional investors, funds, family offices, and fintech companies, focusing on practical business exchanges such as capital deployment and trade execution optimization. Beyond industry conferences, Gate US is continuously strengthening its connectivity and service capabilities in the institutional market by creating more targeted communication opportunities. It is understood that Gate US has successfully obtained a Money Transmitter License in Idaho, USA. Currently, Gate US holds a total of 35 state-level licenses, and its compliance business footprint has further expanded to 46 U.S. jurisdictions, including Illinois, Ohio, Michigan, North Carolina, Georgia, Arizona, and Wisconsin.

data.title: Spot gold touched $4,600 per ounce, up 1.25% on the day.
data.description: Gate data shows that spot gold touched $4,600 per ounce, up 1.25% on the day.

data.title: Tether Treasury Mints 1 Billion USDT on Tron Network
data.description: On April 30, Tether Treasury minted 1 billion USDT on the Tron network at 15:45 (UTC+8). According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, this significant issuance was observed by WhaleAlert, a platform known for tracking large cryptocurrency transactions. The minting of USDT, a widely used stablecoin, is part of Tether's ongoing operations to manage liquidity and meet market demand. This development highlights the continued expansion and utilization of stablecoins within the cryptocurrency ecosystem.

data.title: Printr Announces Leadership Change and Community Fund Refund
data.description:
Printr's founder has announced his resignation as CEO, with COO and GTM head Lennon immediately stepping into the CEO role. According to Odaily, co-founder Lea will continue as CTO, while the former CEO will transition to an advisory position.

In addition, Printr has declared a full refund of community-raised funds, with the refund process expected to be announced within seven days. The team stated that this move aims to rebuild community trust, while the platform's products, team, and development roadmap will remain unchanged.

data.title: Japan's Central Bank May Raise Rates in June, Economist Says
data.description: On April 30, economist Nobuyasu Atago from Rakuten Securities Economic Research Institute stated that the Bank of Japan is likely to raise policy rates at its next meeting in June, unless concerns over energy supply intensify before mid-June. According to Jin10, Atago mentioned that the possibility of a swift rate hike by the Bank of Japan is high once the impact on supply chains, particularly the risks of disruptions in crude oil and naphtha procurement, begins to ease. Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda has previously emphasized the central bank's focus on avoiding falling behind in addressing inflation issues.

data.title: Germany's April Unemployment Rate Rises to 6.4%
data.description: Germany's seasonally adjusted unemployment rate for April was reported at 6.4%, according to Jin10. This figure is higher than the expected 6.3% and the previous rate of 6.3%.

data.title: MGBX will launch trading pairs for AIGENSYNUSDT and CHIPUSDT perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will launch the AIGENSYNUSDT and CHIPUSDT perpetual contract trading pairs on April 30, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Trading will open at 18:00 on April 30, 2026 (SGT). Leverage will be supported up to 20x for AIGENSYN and up to 50x for CHIP.

data.title: Indian Trading Startup Graviton Expands to Singapore and London Amid Domestic Challenges
data.description: Indian high-frequency trading startup Graviton is expanding its operations to Singapore and London. Bloomberg posted on X that this move comes as the company faces increasing competition and regulatory challenges in its home market. Graviton aims to leverage the opportunities in these international financial hubs to enhance its growth and market presence. The expansion reflects a strategic shift to navigate the evolving landscape of the trading industry.

data.title: Senator Tillis Pushes for Senate Action on Crypto Market Structure Bill
data.description: Senator Thom Tillis has announced his intention to urge the Senate Banking Committee to schedule a markup for the delayed crypto market structure bill upon the Senate's return on May 11. According to NS3.AI, Tillis noted that while the text of the bill has advanced, disagreements concerning stablecoin yield, ethics regulations, and protections for software developers have hindered progress. The House of Representatives passed its version, known as the CLARITY Act, in July, but the Senate's version is still under negotiation.

data.title: Bitcoin's Bear Market Continues with 39% Decline Over 205 Days
data.description: Bitcoin remains in a bear market, according to CryptoQuant contributor Zizcrypto. The cryptocurrency has fallen approximately 39% over the past 205 days since reaching its last all-time high. According to NS3.AI, Zizcrypto compared this decline with previous cycle bottoms, noting that Bitcoin experienced drops of 86% in 2015, 83% in 2018, and 76% in 2022. He highlighted that the current decrease is still limited compared to earlier capitulation phases.

data.title: Strive's SATA Secures Funds for Bitcoin Acquisition
data.description: Strive's subsidiary, SATA, has reportedly gathered sufficient funds to purchase 184 BTC. According to Odaily, Strive is the first company to fully adhere to the Bitcoin treasury strategy advocated by Michael Saylor.

data.title: Guangzhou Port Reports April 2026 Throughput Estimates
data.description: Guangzhou Port announced on April 30, 2026, that it expects to handle 2.384 million TEUs (twenty-foot equivalent units) in April, marking a 0.5% increase compared to the same period last year. According to Jin10, the port also anticipates a cargo throughput of 51.084 million tons for the month, reflecting a 1.2% year-on-year growth. For the period from January to April 2026, Guangzhou Port estimates a total container throughput of 9.059 million TEUs, up 4.3% from the previous year, and a cargo throughput of 191.26 million tons, representing a 2.7% increase year-on-year.

data.title: BitMart will list MegaETH (MEGA)
data.description: According to an official announcement, BitMart will list MegaETH (MEGA) on April 30th at 19:00 (UTC+8), with the MEGA/USDT trading pair available. MegaETH is the first real-time blockchain, allowing crypto applications to fully realize its potential with its extreme performance. Secured by Ethereum, MegaETH utilizes a highly optimized execution environment with a heterogeneous architecture. It offers streaming throughput with 10ms latency and up to 100,000 TPS. Developers can extend their applications using real-time state streaming, and users can enjoy instant transactions while retaining Ethereum's full composability.

data.title: Thailand's Central Bank: GDP May Contract in Q1
data.description: Thailand's central bank has indicated that the country's GDP might experience a quarter-on-quarter contraction in the first quarter. According to Jin10, this potential economic downturn is attributed to various factors impacting Thailand's economic performance. The central bank's assessment highlights concerns over domestic and international economic conditions that could influence growth rates. Further details on the specific causes of this anticipated contraction were not provided in the report.

data.title: Strive's SATA subsidiary is expected to have raised enough funds to purchase 184 BTC.
data.description: Strive's subsidiary SATA reportedly raised enough funds yesterday to purchase 184 BTC. Strive is the first company to fully comply with Saylor's Bitcoin treasury strategy. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: Gonka Protocol Releases Milestone Update to Address DeAI Issues
data.description: Gonka Protocol has recently launched its significant 0.2.12 version update. According to PANews, this update is not only a technical iteration but also a strategic move to tackle the challenges within the DeAI sector.

data.title: USDC Yield Opportunities on Solana and Polygon Blockchains
data.description: Users can now earn yields in USDC on the Solana and Polygon blockchains. According to PANews, this development allows individuals to leverage these platforms for potential financial gains using the stablecoin USDC. The integration of yield opportunities on these blockchains aims to enhance user engagement and provide more options for cryptocurrency investors.

data.title: Trade.xyz Sees Surge in Traditional Asset Contracts on Hyperliquid Platform
data.description:
On April 30, Trade.xyz experienced a notable increase in activity on the Hyperliquid platform, according to BlockBeats On-chain Detection. The deployment of traditional asset mapping contracts through the HIP-3 protocol has seen open interest rise to previous highs, reaching $2.156 billion, which accounts for over 90% of the HIP-3 market share. Concurrently, trading volume has reached approximately $2.718 billion.

In other developments, U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that blockade measures are 'more effective than bombing' and has rejected Iran's three-stage negotiation proposal. This has contributed to escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, leading to a significant surge in the crude oil market. Brent crude oil prices have approached their highest levels in nearly two years. Driven by these factors, trading activity for WTIOIL and BRENTOIL on the Hyperliquid platform has increased, with a combined daily trading volume of $1.32 billion, surpassing the trading volume of ETH during the same period.

data.title: European Stocks Decline as Markets Open
data.description: European stock markets experienced a downturn as trading commenced, with several indices showing notable declines. According to ChainCatcher, the German DAX30 index fell by 0.9%, while France's CAC40 index dropped 1.3%. Additionally, the Euro Stoxx 50 index decreased by 1.2%, reflecting broader market challenges across the region.

data.title: Switzerland's April KOF Economic Leading Indicator Exceeds Expectations
data.description: Switzerland's KOF Economic Leading Indicator for April was reported at 97.9, surpassing the expected value of 95.9. According to Jin10, the previous value was revised from 96.1 to 95.6.
